figures_detected.description: Crankshaft pulley showing TDC mark and pointer, with degree markings 5°, 10°, 15°, 20° visible
Top view of cylinder head showing valve positions for first check (No.1 cylinder at TDC compression stroke) — valves numbered 1,1,2,2 on INT side and 1,1,3,3 on EXH side
Photo showing feeler gauge being used to measure clearance between valve lifter and camshaft
Top view of cylinder head showing valve positions for second check (after 360° rotation) — valves numbered 3,3,4,4 on INT side and 2,2,4,4 on EXH side
Tool (A) KV10115110 placed around camshaft with notch visible, used for shim removal during valve clearance adjustment

content_blocks.text: Check valve clearance while engine is warmed up sufficiently and not running.

steps.text: Set No. 1 cylinder at T.D.C. on its compression stroke.
notes: Align pointer with T.D.C. mark on crankshaft pulley.
Check that valve lifters on No. 1 cylinder are loose and valve lifters on No. 4 are tight. If not, turn crankshaft one revolution (360°) and align as above.

steps.text: Check only those valves shown in the figure.
notes: Using a feeler gauge, measure clearance between valve lifter and camshaft.
Record any valve clearance measurements which are out of specification. They will be used later to determine the required replacement adjusting shim.

steps.text: Turn crankshaft one revolution (360°) and align mark on crankshaft pulley with pointer.
Check those valves shown in the figure.
notes: Use the same procedure as mentioned in step 4.

steps.text: If all valve clearances are within specification, install the following parts: Rocker cover. All spark plugs.

content_blocks.text: Adjust valve clearance while engine is cold.

steps.text: Turn crankshaft, to position cam lobe on camshaft of valve that must be adjusted upward.
Place Tool (A) around camshaft as shown in figure.
warnings: Be careful not to damage cam surface with Tool (A).
notes: Before placing Tool (A), rotate notch toward center of cylinder head (See figure.), to simplify shim removal later.

content_blocks.text: Before placing Tool (A), rotate notch toward center of cylinder head (See figure.), to simplify shim removal later.
CAUTION: Be careful not to damage cam surface with Tool (A).

tools_referenced.name: Tool (A)
tools_referenced.usage: Placed around camshaft to facilitate shim removal during valve clearance adjustment
